package rulefixtures

// scenario for select_with_single_case: `select { case v := <-ch: ... }` with only one case and no default
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule635PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario635Positive(records []Rule635PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
